mapper.select:
select university_specialtys.*, university.name as universityName, categorys.name as categorysName, specialtys.name as specialtysName from university_specialtys left join university on university_specialtys.university_id = university.id left join categorys on university_specialtys.categorys_id = categorys.id left join specialtys on university_specialtys.specialtys_id = specialtys.id
and university_specialtys.university_id = #{universityId} and university.name like concat('%', #{universityName}, '%') and university_specialtys.categorys_id = #{categorysId} and categorys.name like concat('%', #{categorysName}, '%') and university_specialtys.specialtys_id = #{specialtysId} and specialtys.name like concat('%', #{specialtysName}, '%')
order by id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into `university_specialtys`
id, university_id, categorys_id, specialtys_id, content,
#{id}, #{universityId}, #{categorysId}, #{specialtysId}, #{content},
mapper.update:
update `university_specialtys`
university_id = #{universityId},
categorys_id = #{categorysId},
specialtys_id = #{specialtysId},
content = #{content},
where id = #{id}
